title: Dynamically Generated $Ξ(1690)$
abstract: We show that the $Ξ(1690)$ resonance can be dynamically generated in the $s$-wave $\bar{K} Σ$-$\bar{K} Λ$-$πΞ$-$ηΞ$ coupled-channels chiral unitary approach. In our model, the $Ξ(1690)$ resonance appears near the $\bar{K} Σ$ threshold as a $\bar{K} Σ$ molecular state and the experimental data are reproduced well. We discuss properties of the dynamically generated $Ξ(1690)$.
comment: 4 pages, 4 EPS figures, talk given at the 12th International Conference on Hypernuclear and Strange Particle Physics (HYP2015), Tohoku, Japan, 7-12 Sep. 2015
